pokemon:okidogi.name: Okidogi
pokemon:okidogi.summary: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.
Okidogi is a ruffian with a short temper. It can pulverize anything by swinging around the chain on its neck.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.

form:okidogi.name: Okidogi
form:okidogi.summary: Okidogi form with Poison / Fighting typing.
